results.justification: LLRD produces exponential per-layer LR decay which is mathematically equivalent to setting ℓ₀=0 and α<1 in ONDOL-CASCADE without an explicit injection point — same effective LR profile.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Layerwise LR in LLM era adaptive
results.justification: Adaptive layer-wise LR with distinct rates per layer learnable — covers same artefact + per-layer coefficient (LR not LR-DECAY but functionally similar).
LLR init not full schedule; partial coverage.
Progressive Residual Warmup explicitly coordinates layer-wise learning across warmup/stable/decay phases — DIRECT TWIN of single-point cascade with temporal-spatial coordination.
Theoretical work on LR decay-to-zero, not layer-spatial cascade.
Compute-optimal scaling — global schedule, not per-layer cascade.
General survey of stabilization techniques — partial overlap.
Diffusion transformer training; per-layer artefact but different mechanism.
